domain.description: Subject domain of the whitepaper (e.g. skill-frameworks, payment-networks)

depth.description: Level of detail: standard (8-12 paragraphs) or comprehensive (15-20 paragraphs)

description: Format findings as a long-form whitepaper that preserves the full evidence chain
usage: write a whitepaper, long-form report, detailed document with evidence, comprehensive writeup, full paper
